channel.title: Al Jazeera – Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera
channel.description: Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera

image.title: Al Jazeera – Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera
image.description: Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera

item.title: What are the biggest FIFA World Cup upsets in history?
item.description: Nothing makes the news like an unfancied or low-ranked team pulling off a shock result at the football World Cup.

item.title: Paraglider survives mid-air collision with plane over Austria
item.description: Paraglider survives mid-air collision with plane over Austria

item.title: Yamal in Spain’s World Cup squad, but no room for Real Madrid players
item.description: Yamal, one of eight Barcelona players named in the 26-man squad, with seven Arsenal players picked by Luis de la Fuente.

item.title: The world urgently needs a US-Iran deal now
item.description: Without a deal between Washington and Tehran, the fallout from Strait of Hormuz closure could deepen global crises.

item.title: China’s Xi praises ‘unbreakable’ Pakistan ties as Sharif visits Beijing
item.description: Prime Minister Shehbaz Sharif says China and Pakistan are 'iron brother' countries.

item.title: Cattle market empties as fear grips Eid preparations in India’s West Bengal
item.description: Tensions rise in key state, won by BJP this month for first time, as political shift disrupts Eid al-Adha traditions.

item.title: Trump’s war loop: Escalate, retreat, repeat
item.description: Stuck in a quagmire of a war, Trump chafes at negative coverage while Iran digs its heels in.

item.title: Surveillance video shows moment of China coal mine blast
item.description: Surveillance video caught the moment a powerful explosion surged through the tunnels of a coal mine in China.

item.title: Israel kills three in attacks on Lebanon, issues more displacement orders
item.description: Israel carries out attacks on multiple villages and towns in southern Lebanon.

item.title: What’s inside the Kaaba and what covers it? The story of the Kiswah
item.description: At the heart of Hajj stands the Kaaba, draped in 670kg of silk and embroidered with 200kg of gold and silver thread.

item.title: Abandoned flotilla boat washes ashore in Egypt with Gaza aid
item.description: A small boat believed to be part of the Global Sumud Flotilla that was carrying aid for Gaza has washed ashore in Egypt

item.title: Messi at the World Cup: Inter Miami injury update, substitution
item.description: Messi asks for a substitution and walks off, feeling his hamstring weeks ahead of Argentina's World Cup title defence.

item.title: How did a rare strain of Ebola outrun doctors?
item.description: How a rare Ebola strain spread across two countries before anyone knew about it.

item.title: Why the SpaceX IPO is the talk of Wall Street and beyond
item.description: Elon Musk's rocket company is expected to make the biggest public debut in history.

item.title: Timelapse shows Hajj pilgrims performing Tawaf in Mecca
item.description: Muslims from around the world are gathering in Saudi Arabia for the annual Hajj pilgrimage.

item.title: Iran war day 87: Trump says US not in rush to sign deal, dashing optimism
item.description: Iranian media are reporting that a deal may not be reached amid disagreements on some key issues.

item.title: Trump says any deal with Iran will be ‘great and meaningful’
item.description: US president says that an agreement with Iran would be "great and meaningful" or there would be "no deal".

item.title: Gaza flotilla activists return to Australia, describing abuse
item.description: Australian activists from the Gaza-bound aid flotilla have arrived back in Sydney, reuniting with loved ones.

item.title: Rubio: ‘Trump’s not going to make a bad deal’
item.description: Rubio: 'Trump's not going to make a bad deal'

item.title: Singapore’s economy beats expectations as gov’t warns of Iran war fallout
item.description: GDP grows 6 percent year-on-year in first quarter as AI boom outweighs rising energy costs.

item.title: Mercedes teen Antonelli wins Canadian GP for fourth straight F1 victory
item.description: Antonelli finished more than 10 seconds ahead of Ferrari’s Hamilton, who secured his second podium finish in 2026.

item.title: Wembanyama scores 33 as Spurs rip Thunder to level NBA playoffs
item.description: NBA Western Conference Finals level at 2-2 after San Antonio Spurs thrash defending champions Oklahoma City 103-82.

item.title: Guardiola delivers emotional farewell as Manchester City manager
item.description: Outgoing Manchester City manager Pep Guardiola spoke about the memories built during his decade at the club

item.title: Venezuelan prisoners stage rooftop protest over alleged abuse and shootings
item.description: Inmates in Venezuela's western Barinas prison staged a protest over alleged abuse.

item.title: Africa Day 2026: Has the continent achieved true liberation?
item.description: Africa Day 2026 spotlights power, debt and digital control as Africans redefine sovereignty.
